meaning: Hurry hurry has no blessing — take your time
One who doesn't listen to elders breaks their leg
One who relies on the hump of a bull never grows thin
Water follows the current — things follow their natural course
Good things sell themselves, bad things need advertising
The cure for fire is fire — fight fire with fire
One who rides two horses splits their groin
What bites you is in your clothes — your enemy is close
How you raise a child is how they grow
Where there's will there's a way

proverb: A friend is one who warns you
meaning: A true friend tells you the truth even when it hurts

proverb: One finger cannot kill a louse
meaning: You need others to accomplish things — teamwork is essential

proverb: The eye crosses the river before the body
meaning: Vision and planning come before action

proverb: He who eats alone dies alone
meaning: Community is everything — share what you have

proverb: Sticks in a bundle cannot be broken
meaning: Unity is strength — together we are unbreakable
One who picks and chooses a hoe is not a farmer
After hardship comes relief
A greedy person never gets to eat the sweet part

proverb: The old woman looks after the child to grow its teeth, and the young one looks after the old woman when she loses her teeth
meaning: Care for your parents as they cared for you

proverb: When elephants fight, it is the grass that suffers
meaning: Conflict between powerful people hurts ordinary citizens

proverb: Kutoa ni moyo usambe ni utajiri
meaning: Giving is about the heart, not about wealth
One hand cannot carry a head — you need help
Intelligence is wealth

proverb: A goat's hide is a reflection of what's inside
meaning: How someone presents themselves reveals their character

proverb: Even a small star shines in the dark
meaning: No matter how insignificant you feel, you have value
The patient one eats ripe fruit

proverb: Usicheze na simba ukidhani ni paka
meaning: Don't play with a lion thinking it's a cat

proverb: Rain beats a leopard's skin but does not wash out the spots
meaning: You cannot change someone's true nature

proverb: The best time to plant a tree was yesterday. The next best time is today
meaning: Don't procrastinate — start now
A bed you don't know doesn't give you sleep
One rotten fish spoils the whole catch
Slowly slowly is the way — steady progress wins
Character is like skin — it's part of you forever

proverb: The lion does not turn around when a small dog barks
meaning: Don't let small distractions bother you

proverb: A single bracelet does not jingle
meaning: You need others to make things work
One without respect doesn't fear God
A stick from far away doesn't kill a snake

proverb: The house of the heart is never full
meaning: There's always room for more love
Regrets are grandchildren — they come after

proverb: The tongue is small but it can break bones
meaning: Words have great power — choose them wisely
